acceptance.assertion: Immediately before any effect, PR #858 state, exact head SHA, base branch, body and changed-file scope are reread from GitHub; a changed head or closed PR invalidates prior assessment.

The repair identifies a current Registry task whose scope authoritatively owns PR #858, or creates a separate reviewed task registration when no such task exists; title similarity or prose inference alone is insufficient.
When an authoritative existing task is found, only PR binding metadata is changed and the PR code head remains byte-identical; the exact before/after head SHA is recorded.
Post-effect Bureau GitHub observation reports no missing-github-task-binding finding for PR #858 while the general missing-binding guard and repository-scoping behavior remain unchanged.
If ownership remains ambiguous, PR #858 is left unchanged and an explicit blocker receipt records the competing candidates and evidence gap instead of forcing a binding.

approval.note: Follow-up from T009 post-merge status projection. Preserve PR #858 head and do not weaken global fail-closed binding guards.

goal: Resolve the live missing-github-task-binding finding for heimgewebe/bureau PR #858 by binding its exact current head to the correct authoritative Bureau task or, if no such task exists, by creating a separately reviewed registration path; never guess a task identity and never weaken the fail-closed open-PR binding guard.

does_not_establish: ownership of PR #858 by any guessed task

title: Repair missing Bureau task binding on PR 858 without weakening fail-closed guards
